meaning: 马拉博[赤道几内亚首都](旧称圣伊萨贝尔
examples: And we are working to bring this right to Malabo.
Malabo is one of the schools that is affected annually.
Malabo is the capital and the second largest city of Equatorial Guinea, located on the northern coast of BiokoIsland.
Mann is being held at the notorious Black Beach prison in Malabo, the capital of Equatorial Guinea.
The trial is being held at a conference centre in the capital, Malabo, and began amid heavy security.
